name: topic_switch_and_return
notes: Mid-flow topic switch: the owner asks an unrelated question, then returns. The flow must survive; the question must get a real answer; no context loss.

steps.message: actually first tell me — what do you charge?
steps.note: Unrelated question mid-beat. Expect an answer (or honest deferral) — not a canned re-prompt of the integration ask.

steps.message: ok back to it, lets continue the setup
steps.note: Resume intent. Expect the flow to pick up where it left off WITHOUT restarting.
